No Poverty.reason: The course content and readings do not provide any direct or inferable links to poverty eradication.

Zero Hunger.reason: The course content and readings do not provide any direct or inferable links to ending hunger or food security.

Good Health and Well-being.reason: A reading on "Applications of structural equation modeling in psychological research" provides a tangential link to mental health and well-being (Target 3.4), though not a primary focus.

Quality Education.reason: As an "Advanced Quantitative Research" doctoral course, it provides quality tertiary education (Target 4.3) and develops "independent research and study ability" (Target 4.4).

Gender Equality.reason: The required reading "Exploring the influence of gender on the web usage" explicitly analyzes gender, directly supporting research for gender equality (Target 5.c).
evidence: Exploring the influence of gender on the web usage

Clean Water and Sanitation.reason: The course content and readings do not provide any direct or inferable links to clean water and sanitation.

Affordable and Clean Energy.reason: The course content and readings do not provide any direct or inferable links to affordable and clean energy.

Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: No direct or strong inferable evidence links the course content or readings to decent work or economic growth.

Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure.reason: The course develops "independent research and study ability," which is fundamental for enhancing scientific research and innovation (Target 9.5).

Reduced Inequalities.reason: The reading "Exploring the influence of gender on the web usage" directly analyzes differences, supporting the promotion of social inclusion and reducing inequalities (Target 10.2).
evidence: Exploring the influence of gender on the web usage

Sustainable Cities and Communities.reason: The required reading on "household waste recycling behavior" directly addresses municipal waste management, a key component of Target 11.6.
evidence: Factors influencing household waste recycling behavior

Responsible Consumption and Production.reason: The reading on "household waste recycling behavior" directly supports Target 12.5, which aims to substantially reduce waste generation through recycling.
evidence: Factors influencing household waste recycling behavior

Climate Action.reason: The course content and readings do not provide any direct or inferable links to climate action.

Life Below Water.reason: The course content and readings do not provide any direct or inferable links to life below water.

Life on Land.reason: The course content and readings do not provide any direct or inferable links to life on land.

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: The course is in "Public Administration" and focuses on "policy analysis," directly contributing to developing effective and accountable institutions (Target 16.6).

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: The course cultivates advanced data analysis methods, directly building capacity for high-quality data and progress measurement (Targets 17.18, 17.19) essential for partnerships.
evidence: 培養資料分析的方法 (Cultivate data analysis methods)
